name: defensive pistol
description: A modern pistol fit for duty, military service, or personal defense, with a detachable box magazine and a reliable action.  Though its chambering is capable of meeting FBI penetration minimums, the lack of a shoulder stock limits its utility.

name: machine pistol
description: This pistol is a tiny machinegun you can stuff into a holster, with which you could dump its magazine at a blistering rate into any close range foes.  Machine pistols mostly see use by vehicle crewmen or bodygaurds of VIP's.  Though it fires standard, controllable duty ammunition, it is difficult to fire controllably.

name: police revolver
description: This may not be an actual police firearm, but revolvers chambered for standard defensive calibers like this one were a favorite of police departments for nearly a century, up until the 1986 Miami shootout.  Still, this model's accuracy and moderate recoil make for a serviceable sidearm, and there are no magazines for you to lose or damage either.

name: survivor subgun
description: A crudely constructed fully automatic submachinegun, accepting standard pistol and submachine gun magazines.  The heavy bolt makes accurate fire difficult, and its questionable construction makes for poor reliability and longevity.  Similar designs of desperation from the second world war served their nations well enough, so this should be good for zombies... right?  Accepts standard pistol ammunition.

name: cowboy carbine
description: Since the early days of western expansion, when ammunition supply was infrequent, shooters sought to share ammo between their sidearms and long arms.  This tube magazine lever action carbine allows the shooter to reduce the number of calibers carried and squeeze more power from their pistol ammunition.

name: survivalist carbine
description: These small carbines share ammunition and magazines with common pistols, offering a more controllable carbine than a normal rifle, while also reducing ammunition costs.  Because of their compatibility, they pair well with duty pistols, allowing one to transition to a more stable weapon without carrying extra ammo or magazines.

name: submachine gun
description: Chambered in controllable, plentiful pistol ammunition, this compact long arm is perfect for trench raiders vehicular crewmen, SWAT and special forces.  It feeds from detachable box magazines, which are easy to unload into close range targets.
